title: Kenyan Sweet Potato Bake
description: A sweet and savory dish from Kenya, featuring roasted sweet potatoes baked to perfection.
instructions: Peel and chop sweet potatoes into 1-inch cubes.
In a large bowl, combine sweet potatoes, mellow seasoning blend, sweet pepper, bake, salt, and black pepper.
Drizzle coconut oil over the sweet potato mixture and toss to coat.
Transfer the sweet potatoes to a baking sheet and roast for 20 minutes.
While the sweet potatoes are roasting, mix Greek yogurt and a pinch of salt in a small bowl.
Remove the sweet potatoes from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
Serve the roasted sweet potatoes with a dollop of yogurt on top.
